task_completion.description: Verify the default timezone is set to 'Europe/Paris'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo administration settings (likely under System > General Settings), the 'Default Timezone' dropdown or input field displays 'Europe/Paris' or 'Paris'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default currency is set to 'EUR - Euro (€)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo administration settings, the 'Default Currency' dropdown or input field displays 'EUR', 'Euro', or '€'.

task_completion.description: Verify the personal report viewing preference for default report date is set to 'Yesterday'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Personal Settings (Personal > Settings), the 'Default Report Date' dropdown displays 'Yesterday'.

task_completion.description: Verify the personal report viewing preference for default report period is set to 'Week'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Personal Settings (Personal > Settings), the 'Default Report Period' dropdown displays 'Week'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the changes to the settings have been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Settings saved', 'Changes saved') is visible on the screen, or the final screenshot shows the settings page with the new values persistently applied after clicking a save button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Matomo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Matomo web application in a browser, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Matomo settings pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the genuine Matomo settings forms, not written in a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is logged in to the Matomo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Matomo dashboard or settings page is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon or 'admin' username visible in the top navigation).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected timezone is 'Europe/Paris' (a standard PHP DateTimeZone identifier). The expected currency is 'EUR' (ISO 4217 code for Euro). The expected default report date is 'yesterday' (or 'Yesterday'). The expected default report period is 'week' (or 'Week'). These values must be selected in the Matomo web interface.
